name: core.openwop.integration
description: Spec-canonical integration pack — universal communication primitives that route through the host's provider-specific adapters. Phase 1 v1.0.0 ships email-send + slack-message (both communication; both side-effectful with engine Layer-2 cost-once caching via deterministic Idempotency-Key derivation). File-system, database-query, and GitHub-action nodes defer to future minors — each needs real connection-pool / credential abstractions in the host.
author: OpenWOP Working Group
